M3 Type Scale

Display
display-large 57/64 400 Display Large
display-medium 45/52 400 Display Medium
display-small 36/44 400 Display Small
Headline
headline-large 32/40 400 Headline Large
headline-medium 28/36 400 Headline Medium
headline-small 24/32 400 Headline Small
Title
title-large 22/28 400 Title Large
title-medium 16/24 500 Title Medium
title-small 14/20 500 Title Small
Body
body-large 16/24 400 Body Large — The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.
body-medium 14/20 400 Body Medium — The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.
body-small 12/16 400 Body Small — The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.
Label
label-large 14/20 500 Label Large (buttons, tabs)
label-medium 12/16 500 Label Medium (badges, chips)
label-small 11/16 500 Label Small (captions, footnotes)
